TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pai Paozhu kaying == Pai Paozhu (Bai Baozhu) (Inkiris: Marjorie Ingeleiv Bly, 1919 miheca 5 folad 30 romi'ad – 2008 miheca 4 folad 8 romi'ad ), o pitahidang no tamdaw paka ci Pai kiying ano eca ci Pai fai han nangra, o cecay sinkiwsi ato kangkoho a Amilika tamdaw. Halafin ko tayal a patado to ciadadaay to malono'ay ato laloma'an no Taywan ato Penho a tamdaw . Da'oc no 'orip I 1919 miheca, itira i Jigongsan no Henan ko sofoc ni Bai Baozhu, o mama ato ina ningra o sinkiwsi no Lutherankay no Amilika. I 1926 miheca, o salikaka ato cingra makaraod no lalood, saka mapa'orip ni Shi Kenen ising ato hongseci (Dr. Schicken and the Red Cross) miliyas; ikor, malinah cangra laloma'an tayra i Northfield no Minnesota, itira to ko pitilid ningra, kona itira cingra i isingan ni Shi Kenen ising matayal. I 1941 miheca, nai St. Eulav's kakoyin misawad to Seno ato syakay ninanaman. I 1944 miheca, itira cingra i Feierwei kangkoho kakoko (Fairview Nursing School) minanam to kangkoho oci todongay to kangkoho a kompay . Misawad i, itira cingra i St. Eulav's kakoyin matayal to cienkangsi a kangkoho; nika, caay katawal ko sakatayraaw i Congko a matayal. I 1946 miheca, itiya malaheci ko sapiocor no Lutherankay a sinkiwsi ato mitiliday nai San Francisco mikalic to tamina pasi Congko ko rakat; nika, saka tosa miheca mapatay ko mama ningra, oya sato a Congko malalood ko laloma'an no Congko. Talacowa mihakelong cingra to sofitay no Conghuaminko pasitimol, nika saikor to i 1949 miheca 7 folad minokay tayra i Amilika. Nanoya, itira cingra i isingan ni Schein ising a mipadang matayal, o na mitanamay cingra mala matayalay i hikoki no Kaetip ka'ami hikoki kosi. Ikor, malayap ningra ko tilid ni Son Lilien sinkiwsi, matahidang tayra i Taywan Lesen pinga'ayan (Liawyangyin) patasdo to malono'ay adadaay tamdaw . I 1952 miheca, itira cingra maocor no Lutherankay tayra i Taywan Lesen pinga'ayan (Liawyangyin) pakatayal , citodong to kangkoho mipatadoay to malono'ay adadaay tamdaw . I 1955 miheca, cingra aci Pan Jinzhang tatosa misitapang i Penho micikeroh to Hansensi (Hansen's) adada "polongan no tamdaw, saromi'aday, polong no loma', polong no syako mikiharay" pacakat to syako kakonghoan midemak, ono Penho isingan "tadamaanay fangesan paising" ko todong, "Piliso' to loma'" ko roma, itiya miteka i Penho sa'etal mipatado midipot to malono'ay adadaay tamdaw k otayal . I 1958 miheca tangasa 1974 miheca, madadoedo k opakalayap ningra to St. Eulav's kakoyin to kasenengan a mitiliday ato kasenengan hakosi no pitilid. I 1989 (1990) miheca, pakalayap to Penhosien cenfo pakaolahan kasenengan finawlan ato polong no kitakit nga'ayay tamdaw nga'ayan demak a dayhiw. I 1994 miheca, mapatodong cingra to saka 4 liyad a isingan sapacakat a kompay sapakaolah. I 1999 miheca, misawad cingra nai kiwkay sinkiwsi a todong, itini sa i Penfo a maro' ko ikoray 'orip. I 2002 miheca, pakalayap cingra to mida'ocay ko aro' a roma kitakit a tamdaw t onano Conghuaminko kika. I 2007 miheca, milayap cingra to pakaolah ni Chen Shuibian congtong to kaliyalaway fo'is. Nanoya, caayto ka nga'ay ko tosor, masamo' pahater to ko faloco', eca to pakanengneng ko mata . I 2008 miheca 4 folad 8 romi'ad, itira cingra i padipotan no Penfo isingan a mapatay; o 'afo no tireng ningra mafolesak no laloma'an i riyar no Penfo. I 2008 miheca 4 folad 23 romi'ad, miliyaw haca ci Chen Shuibian congtong pafeli to sapakaolah a kompay . O nika sasowalen "aka ka talaw, paso'elinen." "Penfo, o loma' ako" "O 'afo no tireng ako, folesak han i riyar no Penfo…" (paikor a sowal) . O nitilidan a cudad Kalohongan 3." (PDF). webcache.googleusercontent.com. (PDF) . www.globalesprit.com. (2017-03-25). (原始內容存檔於2017-03-25).
S.PHON: == pai pao~u*ħo~u~u kajiŋ == pai pao~u*ħo~u~u (b~b~vai b~b~vao~u*ħo~u~u) (inkiris: marjo~uriə iŋəɾəib~v b~b~vɾj, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ), o~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw paka ʦi pai kijiŋ ano~u əʦa ʦi pai fai ħan naŋra, o~u ʦəʦaj sinkiwsi ato~u kaŋko~uħo~u a amiɾika tamɬ~ɮaw. ħaɾafin ko~u tajaɾ a pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u maɾo~uno~uʡaj ato~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u tajwan ato~u pənħo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw . ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ no~u ʡo~urip i **** miħəʦa, itira i *i*o~uŋsan no~u ħənan ko~u so~ufo~uʦ ni b~b~vai b~b~vao~u*ħo~u~u, o~u mama ato~u ina niŋra o~u sinkiwsi no~u ɾo~u~utħərankaj no~u amiɾika. i **** miħəʦa, o~u saɾikaka ato~u ʦiŋra makarao~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, saka mapaʡo~urip ni sħi kənən isiŋ ato~u ħo~uŋsəʦi (ɬ~ɮr. sʦħiʦkən anɬ~ɮ tħə rəɬ~ɮ ʦro~uss) miɾijas; iko~ur, maɾinaħ ʦaŋra ɾaɾo~umaʡan tajra i no~urtħfiəɾɬ~ɮ no~u minnəso~uta, itira to~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ niŋra, ko~una itira ʦiŋra i isiŋan ni sħi kənən isiŋ matajaɾ. i **** miħəʦa, nai st. əo~u~uɾab~vʡs kako~ujin misawaɬ~ɮ to~u səno~u ato~u sjakaj ninanaman. i **** miħəʦa, itira ʦiŋra i fəiərwəi kaŋko~uħo~u kako~uko~u (fairb~viəw no~u~ursiŋ sʦħo~uo~uɾ) minanam to~u kaŋko~uħo~u o~uʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u kaŋko~uħo~u a ko~umpaj . misawaɬ~ɮ i, itira ʦiŋra i st. əo~u~uɾab~vʡs kako~ujin matajaɾ to~u ʦiənkaŋsi a kaŋko~uħo~u; nika, ʦaaj katawaɾ ko~u sakatajraaw i ʦo~uŋko~u a matajaɾ. i **** miħəʦa, itija maɾaħəʦi ko~u sapio~uʦo~ur no~u ɾo~u~utħərankaj a sinkiwsi ato~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj nai san franʦisʦo~u mikaɾiʦ to~u tamina pasi ʦo~uŋko~u ko~u rakat; nika, saka to~usa miħəʦa mapataj ko~u mama niŋra, o~uja sato~u a ʦo~uŋko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u. taɾaʦo~uwa miħakəɾo~uŋ ʦiŋra to~u so~ufitaj no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u pasitimo~uɾ, nika saiko~ur to~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj tajra i amiɾika. nano~uja, itira ʦiŋra i isiŋan ni sʦħəin isiŋ a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ matajaɾ, o~u na mitanamaj ʦiŋra maɾa matajaɾaj i ħiko~uki no~u kaətip kaʡami ħiko~uki ko~usi. iko~ur, maɾajap niŋra ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ ni so~un ɾiɾiən sinkiwsi, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ tajra i tajwan ɾəsən piŋaʡajan (ɾiawjaŋjin) patasɬ~ɮo~u to~u maɾo~uno~uʡaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw . i **** miħəʦa, itira ʦiŋra mao~uʦo~ur no~u ɾo~u~utħərankaj tajra i tajwan ɾəsən piŋaʡajan (ɾiawjaŋjin) pakatajaɾ , ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kaŋko~uħo~u mipataɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u maɾo~uno~uʡaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw . i **** miħəʦa, ʦiŋra aʦi pan *in*ħaŋ tato~usa misitapaŋ i pənħo~u miʦikəro~uħ to~u ħansənsi (ħansənʡs) aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa "po~uɾo~uŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, saro~umiʡaɬ~ɮaj, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sjako~u mikiħaraj" paʦakat to~u sjako~u kako~uŋħo~uan miɬ~ɮəmak, o~uno~u pənħo~u isiŋan "taɬ~ɮamaanaj faŋəsan paisiŋ" ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, "piɾiso~uʡ to~u ɾo~umaʡ" ko~u ro~uma, itija mitəka i pənħo~u saʡətaɾ mipataɬ~ɮo~u miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u maɾo~uno~uʡaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw k o~utajaɾ . i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa, maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u k o~upakaɾajap niŋra to~u st. əo~u~uɾab~vʡs kako~ujin to~u kasənəŋan a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u kasənəŋan ħako~usi no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **** (****) miħəʦa, pakaɾajap to~u pənħo~usiən ʦənfo~u pakao~uɾaħan kasənəŋan finawɾan ato~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit ŋaʡajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ŋaʡajan ɬ~ɮəmak a ɬ~ɮajħiw. i **** miħəʦa, mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦiŋra to~u saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ a isiŋan sapaʦakat a ko~umpaj sapakao~uɾaħ. i **** miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra nai kiwkaj sinkiwsi a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, itini sa i pənfo~u a maro~uʡ ko~u iko~uraj ʡo~urip. i **** miħəʦa, pakaɾajap ʦiŋra to~u miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj ko~u aro~uʡ a ro~uma kitakit a tamɬ~ɮaw t o~unano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u kika. i **** miħəʦa, miɾajap ʦiŋra to~u pakao~uɾaħ ni ʦħən sħo~u~uib~b~vian ʦo~uŋto~uŋ to~u kaɾijaɾawaj fo~uʡis. nano~uja, ʦaajto~u ka ŋaʡaj ko~u to~uso~ur, masamo~uʡ paħatər to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, əʦa to~u pakanəŋnəŋ ko~u mata . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itira ʦiŋra i paɬ~ɮipo~utan no~u pənfo~u isiŋan a mapataj; o~u ʡafo~u no~u tirəŋ niŋra mafo~uɾəsak no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan i rijar no~u pənfo~u. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaw ħaʦa ʦi ʦħən sħo~u~uib~b~vian ʦo~uŋto~uŋ pafəɾi to~u sapakao~uɾaħ a ko~umpaj . o~u nika saso~uwaɾən "aka ka taɾaw, paso~uʡəɾinən." "pənfo~u, o~u ɾo~umaʡ ako~u" "o~u ʡafo~u no~u tirəŋ ako~u, fo~uɾəsak ħan i rijar no~u pənfo~u*" (paiko~ur a so~uwaɾ) . o~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ kaɾo~uħo~uŋan *." (pɬ~ɮf). wəb~b~vʦaʦħə.*o~uo~u*ɾəo~u~usərʦo~untənt.ʦo~um. (pɬ~ɮf) . www.*ɾo~ub~b~vaɾəsprit.ʦo~um. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**).
S.FORM: == Pai Paozhu kaying == Pai Paozhu (Bai Baozhu) (Inkiris: Marjorie Ingeleiv Bly, 1919 miheca 5 folad 30 romi'ad – 2008 miheca 4 folad 8 romi'ad ), o pitahidang no tamdaw paka ci Pai kiying ano eca ci Pai fai han nangra, o cecay sinkiwsi ato kangkoho a Amilika tamdaw. Halafin ko tayal a patado to ciadadaay to malono'ay ato laloma'an no Taywan ato Penho a tamdaw . Da'oc no 'orip I 1919 miheca, itira i Jigongsan no Henan ko sofoc ni Bai Baozhu, o mama ato ina ningra o sinkiwsi no Lutherankay no Amilika. I 1926 miheca, o salikaka ato cingra makaraod no lalood, saka mapa'orip ni Shi Kenen ising ato hongseci (Dr. Schicken and the Red Cross) miliyas; ikor, malinah cangra laloma'an tayra i Northfield no Minnesota, itira to ko pitilid ningra, kona itira cingra i isingan ni Shi Kenen ising matayal. I 1941 miheca, nai St. Eulav's kakoyin misawad to Seno ato syakay ninanaman. I 1944 miheca, itira cingra i Feierwei kangkoho kakoko (Fairview Nursing School) minanam to kangkoho oci todongay to kangkoho a kompay . Misawad i, itira cingra i St. Eulav's kakoyin matayal to cienkangsi a kangkoho; nika, caay katawal ko sakatayraaw i Congko a matayal. I 1946 miheca, itiya malaheci ko sapiocor no Lutherankay a sinkiwsi ato mitiliday nai San Francisco mikalic to tamina pasi Congko ko rakat; nika, saka tosa miheca mapatay ko mama ningra, oya sato a Congko malalood ko laloma'an no Congko. Talacowa mihakelong cingra to sofitay no Conghuaminko pasitimol, nika saikor to i 1949 miheca 7 folad minokay tayra i Amilika. Nanoya, itira cingra i isingan ni Schein ising a mipadang matayal, o na mitanamay cingra mala matayalay i hikoki no Kaetip ka'ami hikoki kosi. Ikor, malayap ningra ko tilid ni Son Lilien sinkiwsi, matahidang tayra i Taywan Lesen pinga'ayan (Liawyangyin) patasdo to malono'ay adadaay tamdaw . I 1952 miheca, itira cingra maocor no Lutherankay tayra i Taywan Lesen pinga'ayan (Liawyangyin) pakatayal , citodong to kangkoho mipatadoay to malono'ay adadaay tamdaw . I 1955 miheca, cingra aci Pan Jinzhang tatosa misitapang i Penho micikeroh to Hansensi (Hansen's) adada "polongan no tamdaw, saromi'aday, polong no loma', polong no syako mikiharay" pacakat to syako kakonghoan midemak, ono Penho isingan "tadamaanay fangesan paising" ko todong, "Piliso' to loma'" ko roma, itiya miteka i Penho sa'etal mipatado midipot to malono'ay adadaay tamdaw k otayal . I 1958 miheca tangasa 1974 miheca, madadoedo k opakalayap ningra to St. Eulav's kakoyin to kasenengan a mitiliday ato kasenengan hakosi no pitilid. I 1989 (1990) miheca, pakalayap to Penhosien cenfo pakaolahan kasenengan finawlan ato polong no kitakit nga'ayay tamdaw nga'ayan demak a dayhiw. I 1994 miheca, mapatodong cingra to saka 4 liyad a isingan sapacakat a kompay sapakaolah. I 1999 miheca, misawad cingra nai kiwkay sinkiwsi a todong, itini sa i Penfo a maro' ko ikoray 'orip. I 2002 miheca, pakalayap cingra to mida'ocay ko aro' a roma kitakit a tamdaw t onano Conghuaminko kika. I 2007 miheca, milayap cingra to pakaolah ni Chen Shuibian congtong to kaliyalaway fo'is. Nanoya, caayto ka nga'ay ko tosor, masamo' pahater to ko faloco', eca to pakanengneng ko mata . I 2008 miheca 4 folad 8 romi'ad, itira cingra i padipotan no Penfo isingan a mapatay; o 'afo no tireng ningra mafolesak no laloma'an i riyar no Penfo. I 2008 miheca 4 folad 23 romi'ad, miliyaw haca ci Chen Shuibian congtong pafeli to sapakaolah a kompay . O nika sasowalen "aka ka talaw, paso'elinen." "Penfo, o loma' ako" "O 'afo no tireng ako, folesak han i riyar no Penfo…" (paikor a sowal) . O nitilidan a cudad Kalohongan 3." (PDF). webcache.googleusercontent.com. (PDF) . www.globalesprit.com. (2017-03-25). (原始內容存檔於2017-03-25).
S.PHON: == pai pao~u*ħo~u~u kajiŋ == pai pao~u*ħo~u~u (b~b~vai b~b~vao~u*ħo~u~u) (inkiris: marjo~uriə iŋəɾəib~v b~b~vɾj, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ), o~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw paka ʦi pai kijiŋ ano~u əʦa ʦi pai fai ħan naŋra, o~u ʦəʦaj sinkiwsi ato~u kaŋko~uħo~u a amiɾika tamɬ~ɮaw. ħaɾafin ko~u tajaɾ a pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u maɾo~uno~uʡaj ato~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u tajwan ato~u pənħo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw . ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ no~u ʡo~urip i **** miħəʦa, itira i *i*o~uŋsan no~u ħənan ko~u so~ufo~uʦ ni b~b~vai b~b~vao~u*ħo~u~u, o~u mama ato~u ina niŋra o~u sinkiwsi no~u ɾo~u~utħərankaj no~u amiɾika. i **** miħəʦa, o~u saɾikaka ato~u ʦiŋra makarao~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, saka mapaʡo~urip ni sħi kənən isiŋ ato~u ħo~uŋsəʦi (ɬ~ɮr. sʦħiʦkən anɬ~ɮ tħə rəɬ~ɮ ʦro~uss) miɾijas; iko~ur, maɾinaħ ʦaŋra ɾaɾo~umaʡan tajra i no~urtħfiəɾɬ~ɮ no~u minnəso~uta, itira to~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ niŋra, ko~una itira ʦiŋra i isiŋan ni sħi kənən isiŋ matajaɾ. i **** miħəʦa, nai st. əo~u~uɾab~vʡs kako~ujin misawaɬ~ɮ to~u səno~u ato~u sjakaj ninanaman. i **** miħəʦa, itira ʦiŋra i fəiərwəi kaŋko~uħo~u kako~uko~u (fairb~viəw no~u~ursiŋ sʦħo~uo~uɾ) minanam to~u kaŋko~uħo~u o~uʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u kaŋko~uħo~u a ko~umpaj . misawaɬ~ɮ i, itira ʦiŋra i st. əo~u~uɾab~vʡs kako~ujin matajaɾ to~u ʦiənkaŋsi a kaŋko~uħo~u; nika, ʦaaj katawaɾ ko~u sakatajraaw i ʦo~uŋko~u a matajaɾ. i **** miħəʦa, itija maɾaħəʦi ko~u sapio~uʦo~ur no~u ɾo~u~utħərankaj a sinkiwsi ato~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj nai san franʦisʦo~u mikaɾiʦ to~u tamina pasi ʦo~uŋko~u ko~u rakat; nika, saka to~usa miħəʦa mapataj ko~u mama niŋra, o~uja sato~u a ʦo~uŋko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u. taɾaʦo~uwa miħakəɾo~uŋ ʦiŋra to~u so~ufitaj no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u pasitimo~uɾ, nika saiko~ur to~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj tajra i amiɾika. nano~uja, itira ʦiŋra i isiŋan ni sʦħəin isiŋ a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ matajaɾ, o~u na mitanamaj ʦiŋra maɾa matajaɾaj i ħiko~uki no~u kaətip kaʡami ħiko~uki ko~usi. iko~ur, maɾajap niŋra ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ ni so~un ɾiɾiən sinkiwsi, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ tajra i tajwan ɾəsən piŋaʡajan (ɾiawjaŋjin) patasɬ~ɮo~u to~u maɾo~uno~uʡaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw . i **** miħəʦa, itira ʦiŋra mao~uʦo~ur no~u ɾo~u~utħərankaj tajra i tajwan ɾəsən piŋaʡajan (ɾiawjaŋjin) pakatajaɾ , ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kaŋko~uħo~u mipataɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u maɾo~uno~uʡaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw . i **** miħəʦa, ʦiŋra aʦi pan *in*ħaŋ tato~usa misitapaŋ i pənħo~u miʦikəro~uħ to~u ħansənsi (ħansənʡs) aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa "po~uɾo~uŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, saro~umiʡaɬ~ɮaj, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sjako~u mikiħaraj" paʦakat to~u sjako~u kako~uŋħo~uan miɬ~ɮəmak, o~uno~u pənħo~u isiŋan "taɬ~ɮamaanaj faŋəsan paisiŋ" ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, "piɾiso~uʡ to~u ɾo~umaʡ" ko~u ro~uma, itija mitəka i pənħo~u saʡətaɾ mipataɬ~ɮo~u miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u maɾo~uno~uʡaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw k o~utajaɾ . i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa, maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u k o~upakaɾajap niŋra to~u st. əo~u~uɾab~vʡs kako~ujin to~u kasənəŋan a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u kasənəŋan ħako~usi no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **** (****) miħəʦa, pakaɾajap to~u pənħo~usiən ʦənfo~u pakao~uɾaħan kasənəŋan finawɾan ato~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit ŋaʡajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ŋaʡajan ɬ~ɮəmak a ɬ~ɮajħiw. i **** miħəʦa, mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦiŋra to~u saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ a isiŋan sapaʦakat a ko~umpaj sapakao~uɾaħ. i **** miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra nai kiwkaj sinkiwsi a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, itini sa i pənfo~u a maro~uʡ ko~u iko~uraj ʡo~urip. i **** miħəʦa, pakaɾajap ʦiŋra to~u miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj ko~u aro~uʡ a ro~uma kitakit a tamɬ~ɮaw t o~unano~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u kika. i **** miħəʦa, miɾajap ʦiŋra to~u pakao~uɾaħ ni ʦħən sħo~u~uib~b~vian ʦo~uŋto~uŋ to~u kaɾijaɾawaj fo~uʡis. nano~uja, ʦaajto~u ka ŋaʡaj ko~u to~uso~ur, masamo~uʡ paħatər to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, əʦa to~u pakanəŋnəŋ ko~u mata . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itira ʦiŋra i paɬ~ɮipo~utan no~u pənfo~u isiŋan a mapataj; o~u ʡafo~u no~u tirəŋ niŋra mafo~uɾəsak no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan i rijar no~u pənfo~u. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaw ħaʦa ʦi ʦħən sħo~u~uib~b~vian ʦo~uŋto~uŋ pafəɾi to~u sapakao~uɾaħ a ko~umpaj . o~u nika saso~uwaɾən "aka ka taɾaw, paso~uʡəɾinən." "pənfo~u, o~u ɾo~umaʡ ako~u" "o~u ʡafo~u no~u tirəŋ ako~u, fo~uɾəsak ħan i rijar no~u pənfo~u*" (paiko~ur a so~uwaɾ) . o~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ kaɾo~uħo~uŋan *." (pɬ~ɮf). wəb~b~vʦaʦħə.*o~uo~u*ɾəo~u~usərʦo~untənt.ʦo~um. (pɬ~ɮf) . www.*ɾo~ub~b~vaɾəsprit.ʦo~um. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**).
